name: Shenzhen Fastprint Circuit Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Fastprint Circuit Tech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells PCBs in China and internationally. It offers backplanes, HDI boards, high frequency boards, high TG boards, halogen-free boards, flex and rigid-flex boards, and other boards for use in high-tech products; rigid multilayer PCBs, metal-substrate PCBs, HDI PCBs, high-speed signal transmission boards, and semiconductor test products; and IC substrates. The company also provides PCB design services, such as PCB layout design, signal and power integrity design, EMC design and rectification, high speed test, and automatic router training services; and PCB assembly services for electronics manufacturers. It primarily serves communications, aerospace, defense, IT, medical equipment, precision test equipment, and industrial control companies. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
